description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this toniq necklace. Clash them with your season essentials (preferably tonal pastels) for a unique twist. Product DetailsSilver, green and blue glass beads culminate in a silver chain on both sidesHas a rounded lobster clasp closureMaterial and CareGlass beads, metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 109 cm
